overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a snowy mountain landscape at night. The character, dressed in a blue kimono with floral patterns and carrying a shamisen and sword, travels from a forested path with a stone lantern into an open alpine area with snow-covered peaks and red maple trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain path with wooden railings and stone lantern

events.description: passing the illuminated stone lantern on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a forested mountain path carrying a shamisen and sword on back

entered.detail: traditional Japanese stone lantern with warm orange light
simple wooden fence running alongside the dirt path
dense evergreen trees flanking both sides of the path
snow-capped mountain peaks visible through the trees in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow forested path at night, passing a glowing stone lantern on the right. Wooden railings line the left side of the trail while dense pine trees create an enclosed feeling. Snow-capped mountains are visible in the far distance through gaps in the forest.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail opening to alpine vista

events.description: exiting dense forest into open mountain landscape with expansive sky

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the forest opens to reveal snow-capped mountains ahead

segments.scene_description: The path opens up as the character leaves the dense forest behind, revealing a wide mountain vista. The wooden railings and stone lantern disappear from view while snow-capped mountains become more prominent in the center of the frame. The sky is now fully visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered alpine meadow with red maple trees

events.description: ground becomes covered in snow and red maple trees appear on the left
path curves slightly to the right toward the snow-covered peaks

agents.ego_description: walking through open snow-covered landscape surrounded by mountains on all sides

entered.detail: distinctive red-leaved maple trees contrasting against the snow

segments.scene_description: The terrain transitions to snow-covered ground as the character enters an open alpine meadow. Red maple trees appear on the left, providing a splash of color against the blue-white snow landscape. Mountains now surround the path on all sides, creating an expansive, isolated atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, forested trail into a vast, snow-covered alpine wilderness under a night sky. It begins with the character walking along a narrow path enclosed by dense pine trees and wooden railings, passing a glowing stone lantern that casts a soft light. As the character moves forward, the forest thins and the path opens up, causing the railings and lantern to vanish as a wide mountain vista reveals itself. The scene then shifts into an open alpine meadow where the terrain becomes fully blanketed in snow and vibrant red maple trees emerge on the left. Finally, the perspective expands to show towering snow-capped mountains surrounding the character on all sides, completing the transition into an isolated mountain landscape.
